# docs/

Format specs specific to Memex. Populated after the synthesis session and format/schema lock.

Anticipated contents:
- `MEMEX_SPEC.md` — what the product is, what it does, what it does not do
- `WIKI_PAGE_FORMAT.md` — project wiki page format (extending Skill Atelier's `docs/PROJECT_WIKI_FORMAT.md`)
- `SKILL_FORMAT.md` — format for Memex skill files (inherits from Skill Atelier's `docs/SKILL_FORMAT.md`)
